title: Vegetarian Kale Soup
description: This wonderful soup will warm your insides, delight your taste buds, and fill your stomach on a cold winter's night. It is full of dark green kale, potatoes, and cannellini beans.

directions.displayValue: Heat the olive oil in a large soup pot; cook the onion and garlic until soft. Stir in the kale and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes. Stir in the water, vegetable bouillon, tomatoes, potatoes, beans, Italian seasoning, and parsley. Simmer soup on medium heat for 25 minutes, or until potatoes are cooked through. Season with salt and pepper to taste.

ingredients.displayValue: 1 bunch kale, stems removed and leaves chopped
2 (15 ounce) cans cannellini beans (drained if desired)

topReviews.text: Easy, cheap and massive!  I made this last night and had to transfer from a large pot to my largest soup pot, by the time I added the cannelini beans.  Lesson 1, use a huge pot!  My husband is NOT a kale fan, but he loved this and even packed a large bowl for his lunch today.  Changes I made: 1. I don't use MSG, so instead of Knorr bouillon + water, I used 8 c. of veggie broth (can use homemade or a good, cheap version like Trader Joe's).  I generously added Trocomare (organic leek/celery) salt as well as sea salt to help with flavor. 2. I didn't peel the potatoes before cubing and they were delicious.  Changes I'll make next time: 1. Add a bay leaf; 2. Half the dried parsley from 2 Tbsp down to 1 Tbsp. A wonderful soup recipe and an easy way to eat the superfood kale!

Since I had a bag of fresh kale on hand, I came to All Recipes looking for a recipe I use it in. I chose this recipe because of the reviews and because I had the ingredients on hand. I was not disappointed. This was a very tasty soup. I reduced the oil by half, and only used one large potato. That was plenty of potato for my tastes. Everything else I kept exactly as written and it was a very hearty soup. My one suggestion would be to cook it longer. Next time I will leave out the potatoes and beans for about 45 minutes. Then I will add them and cook for another 45 minutes. I just found my kale to be too tough after about 45  minutes of simmering.
this soup was amazing!!! five stars definately. the only thing i did differently was not use the boullion cubes, i couldnt find them so i just used a thick base. excellent!!

recipes.title: Kale and Cabbage Soup
recipes.description: This recipe makes a hearty kale and kidney bean soup with cabbage and tomatoes.

recipes.title: Savory Kale, Cannellini Bean, and Potato Soup
recipes.description: A savory kale, white bean, and potato soup, seasoned with fresh herbs, and one spicy red chile, is delicious and wholesome.

recipes.title: Chilled Kale and Potato Soup
recipes.description: Kale and potato are gently simmered in a flavorful broth with a bit of smoky bacon. Serve it hot, or chill it for a couple hours for a refreshingly savory soup.

recipes.title: My Trainer's Kale Soup
recipes.description: Kale soup loaded with beans and vegetables is a hearty and flavorful soup to have for lunch or dinner. Serve with a chunk of crusty bread.

recipes.title: Kale and Butter Beans Soup with Pesto
recipes.description: Inspired by a lentil soup, this recipe flavors a mixture of butter beans, kale, carrot, tomato, and onion with basil pesto and fresh basil leaves.

recipes.title: Portuguese Kale Soup
recipes.description: Pea beans, chorizo, cabbage, kale and potatoes are slowly cooked together in this traditional soup.

recipes.title: Spicy Kale and Shrimp Soup
recipes.description: Red curry paste puts the flavor and the heat in this chicken broth-based soup with kale, shrimp, tomatoes, mushrooms, carrots, and kidney beans.

recipes.title: Roasted Vegetable and Kale Soup
recipes.description: Roasted vegetables are pureed and cooked with broth, kale, and a nice mix of Italian sausages for a hearty soup.

recipes.title: Almost Tuscan Sausage and Kale Soup
recipes.description: This Italian-inspired sausage and kale soup with cannellini beans and potatoes is similar to the Tuscan soup at a popular chain restaurant.

recipes.title: Turkey Garbanzo Bean and Kale Soup with Pasta
recipes.description: Here's a heart-healthy and delicious soup that's easy to customize. Just add or delete ingredients to suit you own tastes.

recipes.title: Busy Night Turkey Taco Soup with Avocado Cream
recipes.description: Leftover cooked turkey is combined with salsa, corn, beans and cilantro in this quick soup topped with avocado cream.

recipes.title: Ham and Split Pea Soup Recipe - A Great Soup
recipes.description: With the slightly sweet, somewhat salty, and subtly smoky flavor of the ham, this hearty soup is the ideal fall or winter soup -- a great one for lunches, or as a starter for dinner.

recipes.title: Simple and Delicious Kale Soup
recipes.description: This kale soup recipe with beans and tomato is quick, easy, and delicious.

recipes.title: Bean Soup With Kale
recipes.description: White beans, cannellini or navy, and chicken broth form the base of this soup made with fresh kale and tomatoes.

recipes.title: Roasted Vegetable and Kale Soup
recipes.description: Roasted vegetables are pureed and cooked with broth, kale, and a nice mix of Italian sausages for a hearty soup.

recipes.title: Beef Barley Vegetable Soup
recipes.description: A chuck roast is cooked with barley and bay leaf in a slow cooker before it is cubed and added to a soup pot of simmering vegetables in a beef broth.

recipes.title: Grandma's Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.description: This savory, homemade chicken noodle soup made with chicken broth, egg noodles, vegetables, and chicken is a real people pleaser.

recipes.title: Cauliflower Au Gratin
recipes.description: Cauliflower is baked in a rich cheese sauce and topped with an extra sprinkling of Cheddar cheese creating the perfect cauliflower au gratin side dish.

recipes.title: Super Squash
recipes.description: It's neither bird nor plane - just a great summer recipe! This squash casserole is filled with flavor and baked with a wonderful stuffing crust.

recipes.title: Oven-Baked Caramel French Toast
recipes.description: This is perfect served with quiche, homemade home fries and fresh coffee! I make the bread for this recipe using my bread machine!
